name: meta-eval run is triggered on a major release tag in addition to the quarterly schedule
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/meta-eval/run.sh" --trigger major-release --release-tag v2.0.0 --findings-stub p0=0 2>out.txt && grep -q 'trigger=major-release' out.txt && grep -q 'release_tag=v2.0.0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
